name_en: Top-tier original leather M25466 Mini Crafty series once again imbues the Capucines mini bag with artisanal light. Taurillon cow leather shapes a classic silhouette, while the woven handle adds a sophisticated touch. The LV lettering displays a jacquard effect, and a detachable tassel hangs below the lock. Dimensions: 13.6 x 8 x 21 cm (H x W x D)
